rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM ROUSE VS. CHEVRON CORP. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 14, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT ATLANTIC RICHFIELD COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH ONE FINAL 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST IDENTIFY THE INJURY-PRODUCING TOXIN AND LINK SUCH TOXIN TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD HIS FRAUD CLAIM WITH GREATER SPECIFICITY AND ALLEGE THE ELEMENTS OF EXTREME AND OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT TO SUPPORT CLAIM FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM ROUSE VS. CHEVRON CORP. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 14, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT ATLANTIC RICHFIELD COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: HOLLY BRATT RN VS. KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 14, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANTS KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, WADE NOGY, COLLEEN MCKEOWN, DEBRA RUCKERT, AND TERRI NORIEGA DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE VAGUE, UNCERTAIN, AND UNINTELLIGIBLE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SPECIFY FACTS THAT SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST EACH DEFENDANT. INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS CANNOT BE HELD LIABLE FOR DISCRIMINATION AND RETALIATION CLAIMS UNDER FEHA. (SEE JONES V. TORREY PINES PARTNERSHIP (2008) 42 CAL.4TH 1158.) NO PUBLISHING TO SUPPORT DEFAMATION CAUSE OF ACTION. THERE IS NO REASONABLE POSSIBILTY THAT PLAINTIFF CAN AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: PAMELA DALE VS. THE SAN FRANCISCO OPERA ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 14, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANTS THE FRANCISCO OPERA ASSOCIATION, ROBERT BASSINE, AND DAVID GOCKLEY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 27, 2009 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MAPLE RABB VS. HILFASCO INCORPORATED DBA CENTURY 21 ALLIANCE, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer To Pltf Maple Rabb'S Second Amended Complaint; Demurrer; Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Demurrer To Pltf
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 14, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANTS JAMES CHIN, ORHAN TOLU, AND HILFASCO INCORPORATED'S Demurrer To Plaintiff Maple Rabb's Second Amended Complaint. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF KNEW THE TRUTH OF THE ALLEGED FRAUD BEFORE CLOSING ESCROW WHICH DEFEATS THE FRAUD, MISREPRESENTATION AND CONCEALMENT CLAIMS. THE NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO STATE A CLAIM AND IS AMBIGUOUS. NO PROPERTY WAS TAKEN TO SUPPORT THE ELDER ABUSE CAUSE OF ACTION. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BARS THIS LAWSUIT. THERE IS NO REASONABLE POSSIBILITY THAT PLAINTIFF CAN AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: B L & K ENTERPRISED INC DBA ROSE CONSTRUCTION A
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Petition Top Detemine Rights To Withheld Funds
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 14, 2009, line 10, PETITIONER B L & K ENTERPRISED INC. DBA ROSE CONSTRUCTION'S Petition To Determine Rights To Withheld Funds. DENIED. SEPTEMBER 29, 2008 LETTER REFERS TO "SUBSTANTIAL COMPLETION" NOT FINAL COMPLETION. ROSE FAILS TO SHOW THAT THERE HAS BEEN A CESSATION, I.E., A COMPLETE WORK STOPPAGE ON THE PUBLIC WORK. SEE W.F. HAYWARD CO. V. TRANSAMERICA INS. CO. (1993) 16 CAL.APP.4TH 1101. =(302/CWW/PB)
